title: LemmaList
description: Output of phase4 (support minimization). Consumed by phase5 (Lean emission). A flat list of extracted lemma objects, one per input fragment.

fragment_id.description: Matches the fragment_id from the input fragment.

source_file.description: Passed through from the input fragment.

decl_name.description: Passed through from the input fragment.

premises.description: Minimal support A ⊆ ΓF, formatted as 'name : Type' strings.

body.description: Lem(Υ) as a Lean proposition string, or 'True' when Lem(Υ) = ⊤.

conclusion.description: gF: the root goal of this fragment.

statement.description: Full lemma statement in Lean binder syntax: '(p1 : T1) ... (pN : TN) : conclusion'. Every premise from minimal support and every top-level antecedent of `body` is lifted into a binder; unnamed body antecedents receive fresh `h{k}` names that avoid collision with identifiers already in the statement. When `body` = 'True' no body binder is added. With zero binders the statement degenerates to just `conclusion`.
